result_summary.v2_note_en: Large-sample validation showed the original core signal was real, but not mythical.
result_summary.v2_note_zh: 大样本验证证明原始核心信号有效，但不是神话。

model_timeline.body_en: The first locked buy signal extracted from real trading records. It proved the sample contains a repeatable edge, but large-sample testing pulled the win rate back to a realistic ~68%.
model_timeline.body_zh: 从真实买入记录中提炼出的第一版锁定买点。它证明样本里确实有可重复特征，但大样本验证把胜率拉回更真实的约 68%。

model_timeline.body_en: v3.1 did not simply add complexity. Its real value was forcing version discipline: stop changing rules after seeing results, then test the locked signal across regimes and holding periods.
model_timeline.body_zh: v3.1 不是简单堆复杂条件。它真正的价值是建立版本纪律：看结果之后不再改规则，而是拿锁定信号去跨行情、跨持有期验证。

model_timeline.body_en: v4 moved from one buy signal to a tiered framework. It can evaluate short-term moves and medium/long-term holds; the stricter v4.S layer is designed for the strongest medium-term trend opportunities.
model_timeline.body_zh: v4 从单一买点升级为分层框架。它既能看短线，也能看中长线；其中筛选最严格的 v4.S 层，目标是捕捉最强的中线趋势机会。

model_timeline.body_en: Entry and exit are separated. Short-term exits can reduce drawdown, but the strongest discovery is that strict signals often need 60-120 days to express their edge.
model_timeline.body_zh: 买点和卖点分开研究。短线卖点能降低回撤，但最强发现是：越严格的信号往往需要 60-120 日才能充分释放优势。

strategy_compare.note_zh: 收益更高，但尾部风险更大。

strategy_compare.note_en: Lower drawdown, but may exit strong trends too early.
strategy_compare.note_zh: 回撤更低，但可能卖飞强趋势票。

canonical.source_en: Research note v3.1 LOCKED — Database 3, 500 tech stocks, 2022-2026
canonical.source_zh: 研究终稿 v3.1 锁定版 — 数据库 3 号 · 500 只科技股 · 2022-2026

findings.label_en: Hold period is a vastly under-rated variable
findings.label_zh: 持有期是被严重低估的变量
findings.body_en: The same 52 entry signals produce a 50.0% win rate at a 5-day hold and an 88.5% win rate at an 80-day hold. Hold period doesn't just scale returns — it changes the strategy's identity.
findings.body_zh: 同一批 52 笔进场信号：5 日持有胜率 50.0%，80 日持有胜率 88.5%。持有期决定的不只是收益大小，是策略的本质。

findings.label_zh: 市场风格决定策略命运
findings.body_en: 2022 rewarded short-term reversal (81.5% at 10d). 2025+ rewards medium-term trend holding (88.5% at 80d). The model didn't change — the regime did. There is no permanently optimal strategy; there are only matched holds.
findings.body_zh: 2022 年震荡市奖励短线反转（10 日 81.5%）；2025 年起主线持仓奖励中线趋势（80 日 88.5%）。模型没变，市场变了。没有永远有效的策略，只有匹配市场的持有期。

findings.label_zh: 短线"失效"往往是视角错配
findings.body_en: Q4 2025 looked like model collapse: 10-day win rate fell to 41.7%. The same signals at 80-day hold: 71.4%. Question your viewpoint before you question the model — most apparent failures are wrong holding periods, not broken edges.
findings.body_zh: 2025 Q4 看似 v3.1 灾难季（10 日胜率 41.7%），同一批信号用 80 日持有：71.4%。怀疑视角，不要急着怀疑模型 —— 大多数"看似失效"只是持有期错配。

findings.label_en: Smart filters are usually overfitting in disguise
findings.label_zh: 聪明的过滤往往是过拟合的伪装
findings.body_en: Sector strength filter, relative-strength check, dynamic exits, RSI band tightening — all tested, all failed. Each looked smarter than the base model; each made results worse. Simple core rules + the right hold period beat layered filters.
findings.body_zh: 板块强度过滤、相对强度检查、动态退出、RSI 区间收窄 —— 全部测过，全部失败。每一个看起来都比原版更"聪明"，每一个都让结果更差。简单核心规则 + 正确持有期，胜过复杂层层过滤。

market_regime.note_en: Sector rotation rapid; 5-10d mean reversion worked everywhere.
market_regime.note_zh: 板块快速轮动；5-10 日均值回归在各处都有效。

market_regime.note_en: Capital lacked consensus direction; reversal strategies fail across the board.
market_regime.note_zh: 资金一致性预期不足，方向感弱；短线反转策略集体失灵。

market_regime.note_en: 5d holds 71% / 20d holds 41% - choppy market; short OK, medium dangerous.
market_regime.note_zh: 5 日持有 71%、20 日持有 41% - 震荡市；短线还能做，中线持有就是雷。

market_regime.note_en: Technology beta strengthened. The adapted view shifts from quick reversal to v4 medium-term trend holding.
market_regime.note_zh: 科技主线增强后，适配视角从短线反转切换到 v4 中线趋势持有。

market_regime.note_en: Short-term 10D view was no longer appropriate. The stricter v4.S layer is used to evaluate medium/long-term continuation.
market_regime.note_zh: 10 日短线视角不再适配。这里改用筛选更严格的 v4.S 中长线口径展示模型进步。

criterion_en: Protected research logic — public page shows results only.
criterion_zh: 受保护的研究逻辑 — 公开页面只展示结果。

v4_horizon.body_en: Useful for checking whether the entry has immediate follow-through, but not where the model's strongest edge appears.
v4_horizon.body_zh: 适合验证买点是否有短期跟随，但这不是模型最强的地方。

v4_horizon.body_en: The signal starts to reveal its true character as a trend-entry filter rather than a quick reversal trade.
v4_horizon.body_zh: 信号开始显露真正属性：它更像趋势进场过滤器，而不是单纯短线反转交易。

v4_horizon.body_en: The strictest layer filters harder and fires less often, but historically produced the strongest medium/long-term results.
v4_horizon.body_zh: 最严格的层级筛得更少，但历史上给出了最强的中长线结果。
